documents.title: Shelter Surge SOP v3
documents.snippet: When medical triage waiting exceeds 10, dispatch at least one EMT-B or RN per 50 evacuees. Pair any first-deployment volunteer with a veteran for the first shift.

documents.title: Volunteer Safety & Fatigue Policy
documents.snippet: Cap continuous field shifts at 12 hours. Do not route volunteers through zones under an active flash-flood warning. Swiftwater-only personnel for water rescue.

documents.title: Credentialing Requirements
documents.snippet: Restricted evacuation corridors (e.g., mandatory-evac zones) require agency credentials; non-credentialed responders must stage at the nearest safe corridor.

documents.title: Outreach Tone Guide
documents.snippet: Urgent callouts should state location, role needed, start time, and a single confirm action. Keep under 320 characters for SMS.
